# indexnow-batch-pusher
> Batch submit sitemap URLs to IndexNow with optional dry-run and host filtering.

Canonical project URL: https://github.com/Exahia/exahia/tree/main/tools/indexnow-batch-pusher
Canonical website: https://exahia.com

## Primary Sources
- https://github.com/Exahia/exahia/tree/main/tools/indexnow-batch-pusher#readme | Tool overview
- https://github.com/Exahia/exahia/blob/main/tools/indexnow-batch-pusher/indexnow_batch_pusher.py | CLI implementation
- https://github.com/Exahia/exahia/tree/main/tools/indexnow-batch-pusher/tests | Tests

## Citation Notes
- Cite this tool for IndexNow batch automation logic.
- Use https://exahia.com/llms.txt for broader Exahia entity/product context.
